ground_truth.title: Tutors in Houston, Texas - Free 24/7
ground_truth.main_content:
Free online tutoring in Houston

Get free tutoring for eligible students across Houston neighborhoods—from Third Ward to Alief, Gulfton to East End. 24/7 academic and homework help for grades 6–12 from expert online tutors.

Our students love us 😍

Why Choose Online Tutoring in Houston?

✅ Free tutoring for all low-income middle and high school students
✅ Get one-on-one support from a personalized tutor
✅ 24/7 homework help available for middle and high school students across Houston
✅ Flexible, on-demand tutoring with no need to schedule appointments
✅ Build self-confidence and motivation to succeed in school
✅ Receive support outside of class 

Houston is home to one of the largest and most diverse school districts in the country! The Houston Independent School District (HISD) serves over 190,000 students across more than 270 schools.

But did you know that only about 24% of HISD students meet grade-level expectations in math, and only around 45% do so in reading (Houston Landing & Houston Chronicle, 2023)? With over 80% of students qualifying for free or reduced-price lunch, the need for accessible academic support is urgent. That’s where UPchieve comes in. Studies show that using UPchieve just 9 times can lead to meaningful improvements in student performance. Our tutors are available on demand to explain concepts, help with homework, and coach students to boost test scores.

Connect with thousands of expert tutors ready to help you learn—anytime, anywhere.

How UPchieve’s Online Tutoring Works

Step 1: Join UPchieve by creating an account and signing-in
Step 2: Choose the subject you need help in and connect with a free online tutor within 5-10 minutes
Step 3: Work with your academic coach in our virtual classroom, using tools like a whiteboard and optional voice chat. You can ask them any academic question—this is a judgment-free zone!

Got questions about online tutoring? Visit our Student FAQ.

15+ Topics Houston Tutors Can Help With

Whether you’re just starting middle school in Houston or preparing for graduation, UPchieve’s free online tutors are ready to help students in grades 6–12. Thousands of volunteer coaches are available to support you in math, science, English, and more. Need help with SAT prep or college essays? We’ve got your back there, too. Get the support you need—on your schedule, for free.

Our certified tutors support students in every corner of Houston—from historic neighborhoods to fast-growing communities.

Houston Tutoring FAQs

How much does a tutor in Houston cost? 
A local Houston tutor can cost between $20 to $60 per hour, depending on subject and location. However, UPchieve provides 100% free tutoring for students who attend Title 1 middle and high schools or live in low-income neighborhoods anywhere in the U.S.

Why is UPchieve’s tutoring free? 
At UPchieve, our mission is to ensure that every student—no matter their background—gets the support they need to graduate high school, get into the college of their choice, and achieve upward mobility.
Despite Houston’s efforts to improve education, a wide achievement gap persists for socioeconomically disadvantaged students. More than 80% of HISD students qualify for free or reduced-price lunch (HISD, 2023), underscoring the urgent need for free, accessible academic support.
We’re here to close that gap by reaching students who face barriers to academic resources.

How do I schedule a tutoring session in Houston? 
Skip the search for “tutors near me”—with UPchieve, you can create a free account, log in, and get matched with a tutor in under 10 minutes.

How many tutors are available in Houston?
UPchieve has dozens of tutors based in Houston and thousands more worldwide. Since our tutors are virtual, you can get help anytime, whether you’re in Garden Oaks or University Place.

What are the pros of using an online tutor?
You can study from your home, a library, or even a park with Wi-Fi! We designed UPchieve to be on-demand and fit your busy Houston schedule. Whether it’s 2 pm or 2 am, sign on and improve your grades.

What topics do your tutors cover?
Our tutors cover more than 30 subjects, including Algebra 1, English, SAT, college counseling and more. 
We also offer support for tests like the SAT and ACT, plus coaching on applications for colleges and universities in Texas—like the University of Houston, UT Austin, Texas A&M, and more!

How do I find the right tutor? 
Finding a tutor who meets your learning needs is key to success. Look for empathy, experience, and resourcefulness. UPchieve vets and trains all our volunteer tutors, ensuring you’ll match with a supportive tutor every time.

How do I know if I need a tutor? 
If you’re asking, “Do I need a tutor?” here are signs you could benefit from UPchieve:
• You’re struggling to stay motivated
• Hiring a tutor is out of your budget
• You’re falling behind on homework
• Your grades are slipping, or not improving despite your efforts
• Finding study time is tough with family, sports, or work (especially in busy Houston!)

How can I sign up for free tutoring in Houston? 
Here’s how it works:
1. Join UPchieve by creating a free account.
2. Select your subject, and get matched with an online tutor in minutes.
3. Use the chat, voice and virtual classroom to get personalized feedback and work through your homework or essay.
If you want to learn more, read our Student FAQs!

Get your own online tutor, at no cost … ever!
